name: contrario--apex-agent
description: Transforms your OpenClaw agent with the APEX cognitive framework — a battle-tested thinking system built by a solo founder over 10 months of AI product development. Enhances response quality with structured thinking patterns, context-aware modes, and execution precision for every response. Works with Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, or any local model. Zero API keys. Zero config. Session-scoped — active only while installed.
